uplink.description: full environmental frame: temp 23.5C, humidity 60%, pressure 1013.2 hPa, presence, 350 lux, battery 3.65V
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds LPP frame; raw channel values cross-checked against reference/upstream-codec.js (temperature_1=23.5, humidity_2=60, barometer_3=1013.2, presence_4=1, illuminance_5=350, voltage_6=3.65). Pressure is atmospheric (within 900-1100 hPa).

uplink.description: minimal weather-station frame: negative temp -5.2C and pressure 998.7 hPa
uplink._note: Synthetic; exercises two's-complement negative temperature. Upstream oracle: temperature_1=-5.2, barometer_3=998.7. Covers weather-station required keys air.temperature + air.pressure.

uplink.description: frame with CO2 concentration and GPS: temp 25C, pressure 1013.2 hPa, 412 ppm, position 40,-105
uplink._note: Synthetic; concentration (type 125) -> air.co2, GPS (type 136) -> position.latitude/longitude with altitude as a camelCase extra. Upstream oracle: temperature_1=25, barometer_3=1013.2, concentration_7=412, gps_9={latitude:40, longitude:-105, altitude:1500}.
Synthetic; type 250 is not in the LPP table. Upstream throws 'Sensor type error!: 250' on the same input.

uplink.description: truncated payload: barometer value missing a byte
uplink._note: Synthetic; type 115 (barometer) declares 2 value bytes but only 1 is present.
